description: Collapsible content sections with click-to-expand panels. More general than FAQ. Use for documentation, product specs, terms, course curricula. Layout: vertical stack of panels with clickable headers and chevron icon, smooth slide animation. Multiple panels can open simultaneously.
label: Accordion

items.content:
The starter plan includes 5 projects, unlimited collaborators, and access to all core features. You also get 10GB of storage and priority email support.

  • 5 active projects
  • Unlimited team members
  • 10GB cloud storage
  • Email support
items.title: What is included in the starter plan?

items.content: You can upgrade your subscription at any time from your account settings. Navigate to Settings → Billing and select your desired plan. The price difference will be prorated for the remainder of your billing cycle.
items.title: How do I upgrade my subscription?

items.content: Yes, you can export all your data at any time. We support multiple export formats including CSV, JSON, and PDF. Go to Settings → Data Management → Export to download your complete dataset.
items.title: Can I export my data?

items.content: When your 14-day trial ends, you will be prompted to select a paid plan. Your data and projects will be preserved for 30 days after trial expiration. If you choose not to subscribe, you can still export your data during this grace period.
items.title: What happens when my trial ends?
